description: A FOIA request seeks the following records: well information pertaining to privately and publicly owned water wells.

_provenance.case_name: National Resources Defense Council v. DOD
_provenance.record_description_quote: well information pertaining to privately and publicly owned water wells
_provenance.outcome_quote: the FOIA does not distinguish between
_provenance.note: (b)(9) covers both private and public well data; statute does not distinguish.
